hero.title: Predictable Pricing for Growing Institutions
hero.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan to streamline your campus operations. No hidden fees, just pure institutional efficiency.

plans.name: Standard
plans.desc: Perfect for small colleges focusing on core student management.
technicalDetails: Digital Vault: Secure, encrypted storage for all student dossiers and KYC documents.
Auto-ID: Instant generation of digital identity cards and enrollment numbers.
Smart Library: Barcode-integrated book tracking with automated fine calculation.

plans.name: Professional
plans.desc: Advanced features for growing colleges and mid-sized universities.
technicalDetails: Conflict-Free AI: Advanced heuristics engine for generating complex teacher/room schedules.
Finance Suite: Real-time bank reconciliation and automated fee-reminder triggers.
Fleet-Track: GPS-integrated transport management with driver performance analytics.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.desc: Full-scale ecosystem for large universities and multiple campuses.
technicalDetails: Master-Hub Architecture: Centralized control for unlimited sub-campuses with cross-tenant reporting.
Zero-Trust Security: Biometric and multi-factor authentication for high-level admin operations.
Elastic Deployment: Horizontal scaling support for peak-load periods like exam results.
